query:
INSERT INTO assetCategories (name, description, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('Medical Equipment', 'Medical and healthcare equipment including diagnostic tools, monitors, and treatment devices', NOW(), NOW()),
('Vehicles & Ambulances', 'Transportation vehicles including ambulances, trucks, and service vehicles', NOW(), NOW()),
('IT Equipment', 'Information technology equipment including computers, servers, and networking devices', NOW(), NOW()),
('Generators & Power Equipment', 'Power generation and backup equipment including generators and UPS systems', NOW(), NOW()),
('Office Equipment & Furniture', 'Office furniture, supplies, and general office equipment', NOW(), NOW()),
('Communication Equipment', 'Communication devices including radios, phones, and broadcasting equipment', NOW(), NOW()),
('Emergency Response Equipment', 'Emergency response and disaster relief equipment including rescue tools and supplies', NOW(), NOW());
